title: pandorea australis subsp. linearis
intro: Pandorea australis subsp. linearis, also known as the native passionflower, is a flowering vine native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Pandorea australis subsp. linearis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
